LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON DEFENDANT GABRIELA MEJIA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - JUDGMENT DEBTOR MEJIA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. DEBTOR HAS FAILED TO CARRY THE BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT ALL OF THE FUNDS ARE USED FOR SUPPORT. (CCP 703.580.) THE COURT ORDERS THAT $50.00 BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - GABRIELA MEJIA, TEL. NO. 786-3329, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC's Hearing On Defendant Gabriela Mejia's Claim Of Exemption - Judgment Debtor Mejia's claim of exemption is denied. Debtor has failed to carry the burden of showing that all of the funds are used for support. (CCP 703.580.) The Court orders that $50.00 be withheld from Debtor's earnings per pay period. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)
